children.nodeName: At SENYE, we believe the right material is the foundation of brand storytelling. Our sourcing experts curate a diverse range of high-quality substrates to ensure your custom hang tags perfectly align with your brand positioning, budget, and sustainability goals. 1. Versatile Paper & Cardstock (The Classic Choice) The most popular and cost-effective option for apparel hang tags. Coated Art Paper: Features a smooth, semi-gloss surface for vibrant, high-fidelity color printing. The go-to choice for modern fashion and retail. White Cardboard (Premium Cardstock): Offers excellent stiffness and a clean, high-end feel. Ideal for luxury hang tags requiring structural integrity. Kraft Paper: Durable with a unique natural texture. The perfect choice for eco-friendly hang tags, vintage collections, or rugged outdoor brands. 2. Durable Synthetics (Waterproof & Tear-Resistant) Engineered for longevity and specialized environments like swimwear or outdoor gear. PVC/PP: Flexible, recyclable, and 100% waterproof. These plastic hang tags are built to withstand heavy handling and long-term storage. PET: Offers high transparency and a premium gloss finish, frequently used in high-end cosmetics and electronics packaging. 3. Luxury Metal Accents (The Prestige Tier) Elevate your brand to the elite tier with our custom metal labels. Available in Stainless Steel, Aluminum Alloy, and Copper, these tags are corrosion-resistant and provide a prestigious, weighty feel that resonates with luxury consumers. 4. Tactile Fabric & Woven Tags (The Organic Touch) Soft to the touch and integrated seamlessly with apparel. We offer Cotton, Linen, and Polyester options. These add a craft-oriented, artisanal feel to boutique clothing and home textiles, often paired with our woven labels.

At SENYE, we believe that the right finish transforms a simple tag into a premium brand experience. Our Professional Sourcing Team guides you through a diverse range of advanced printing techniques, while our Strict QC Team ensures every detail—from color saturation to foil precision—meets your exact standards. 1. Luxury Finishes & Textures Hot Foil Stamping (Gold/Silver/Custom Colors): Uses heat and pressure to transfer metallic foil, creating a prestigious, high-luster effect. Perfect for luxury hang tags and high-end brand statements. Embossing & Debossing: Creates a 3D raised or recessed effect on the cardstock, adding a unique physical dimension. Ideal for brands emphasizing heritage and sophisticated custom clothing tags. Spot UV & Glossy Highlights: Applied to specific areas to create a striking contrast between matte and gloss, making your logo or text pop with a premium tactile feel. 2. Precision Printing & Color Accuracy High-Opacity Screen Printing: Delivers vibrant, saturated colors. It’s the industry standard for solid spot colors and metallic inks on dark or specialty black cardstocks. High-Efficiency Offset Printing: Optimized for wholesale hang tags and bulk production. This method offers superior color accuracy (Pantone matching) and is highly cost-effective for large-volume orders. Premium Lamination (Matte/Gloss/Soft-Touch): Adds a protective layer that enhances durability and water resistance. Our Soft-Touch finish provides a silky, "skin-like" texture for a high-end feel. 3. Specialized Customization Custom Die-Cutting & Silhouettes: Precision cutting into any unique shape or rounded corners to match your brand's silhouette. Perfect for creative branding and distinctive garment packaging. Security & Brand Protection: Integration of QR codes, laser engraving, and UV fluorescent inks. Essential for premium brands focused on authenticity and direct consumer engagement.

texts.text:
At SENYE, we believe the right material is the foundation of brand storytelling. Our sourcing experts curate a diverse range of high-quality substrates to ensure your custom hang tags perfectly align with your brand positioning, budget, and sustainability goals.

1. Versatile Paper & Cardstock (The Classic Choice)
The most popular and cost-effective option for apparel hang tags.
Coated Art Paper: Features a smooth, semi-gloss surface for vibrant, high-fidelity color printing. The go-to choice for modern fashion and retail.
White Cardboard (Premium Cardstock): Offers excellent stiffness and a clean, high-end feel. Ideal for luxury hang tags requiring structural integrity.
Kraft Paper: Durable with a unique natural texture. The perfect choice for eco-friendly hang tags, vintage collections, or rugged outdoor brands.

2. Durable Synthetics (Waterproof & Tear-Resistant)
Engineered for longevity and specialized environments like swimwear or outdoor gear.
PVC/PP: Flexible, recyclable, and 100% waterproof. These plastic hang tags are built to withstand heavy handling and long-term storage.
PET: Offers high transparency and a premium gloss finish, frequently used in high-end cosmetics and electronics packaging.

3. Luxury Metal Accents (The Prestige Tier)
Elevate your brand to the elite tier with our custom metal labels. Available in Stainless Steel, Aluminum Alloy, and Copper, these tags are corrosion-resistant and provide a prestigious, weighty feel that resonates with luxury consumers.

4. Tactile Fabric & Woven Tags (The Organic Touch)
Soft to the touch and integrated seamlessly with apparel. We offer Cotton, Linen, and Polyester options. These add a craft-oriented, artisanal feel to boutique clothing and home textiles, often paired with our woven labels.

texts.text:
At SENYE, we believe that the right finish transforms a simple tag into a premium brand experience. Our Professional Sourcing Team guides you through a diverse range of advanced printing techniques, while our Strict QC Team ensures every detail—from color saturation to foil precision—meets your exact standards.

1. Luxury Finishes & Textures
Hot Foil Stamping (Gold/Silver/Custom Colors): Uses heat and pressure to transfer metallic foil, creating a prestigious, high-luster effect. Perfect for luxury hang tags and high-end brand statements.
Embossing & Debossing: Creates a 3D raised or recessed effect on the cardstock, adding a unique physical dimension. Ideal for brands emphasizing heritage and sophisticated custom clothing tags.
Spot UV & Glossy Highlights: Applied to specific areas to create a striking contrast between matte and gloss, making your logo or text pop with a premium tactile feel.

2. Precision Printing & Color Accuracy
High-Opacity Screen Printing: Delivers vibrant, saturated colors. It’s the industry standard for solid spot colors and metallic inks on dark or specialty black cardstocks.
High-Efficiency Offset Printing: Optimized for wholesale hang tags and bulk production. This method offers superior color accuracy (Pantone matching) and is highly cost-effective for large-volume orders.
Premium Lamination (Matte/Gloss/Soft-Touch): Adds a protective layer that enhances durability and water resistance. Our Soft-Touch finish provides a silky, "skin-like" texture for a high-end feel.

3. Specialized Customization
Custom Die-Cutting & Silhouettes: Precision cutting into any unique shape or rounded corners to match your brand's silhouette. Perfect for creative branding and distinctive garment packaging.
Security & Brand Protection: Integration of QR codes, laser engraving, and UV fluorescent inks. Essential for premium brands focused on authenticity and direct consumer engagement.
